reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the light rail line previously designated the Bi-County Transitway.
2. Determine the metropolitan area of the future transfer point for that line and return the area.
original_final_question: In what metropolitan area is the future transfer point for the line previously designated the Bi-County Transitway? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which light rail line was previously designated the Bi-County Transitway? Evidence: Purple Line (Maryland): The Purple Line, previously designated the Bi-County Transitway, is a 16.2 mi light rail line under construction to link the Maryland suburbs of Bethesda, Silver Spring, College Park, and New Carrollton, all in the Washington metropolitan area. -> Purple Line

Node 2: In what metropolitan area is a future transfer point for the Purple Line? Evidence: Takoma Langley Crossroads Transit Center: It is at the intersection of University Boulevard and New Hampshire Avenue, and is the largest bus-only transfer in the Washington, D.C. metropolitan area. It is a future transfer point for the Purple Line. -> Washington, D.C.
